data.name: Esoterika
data.detailed_description:
WARNING : This is an NTR game!

The story is set in the modern world but with some medieval fantasy elements weave into it. The main character (the player will pick a name for him) is a farmer in his late 20s living alone in the country side. He inherited the farm from his father and has been living off of it ever since he got out of university.
One night he found a mysterious unconscious girl wearing armor on his farm (lucky guy).

She claim that her name is Celes and she's a knight that come from another world. She has no knowledge of this world and have nowhere to go. The MC offered to take her in. They start living together and develop a deep emotional connection.


But farming alone isnt exactly the most profitable business in this day and age, and MC want to eventually move to the big city to pursue a different career, and to show Celes a world beyond his small isolated farm, a world of corruption and temptation...


Could our main character protect her from the corruption of this world ?

Esoterika is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel featuring multiple
  • An intriguing narrative
  • Multiple characters/love interests
  • Choices driven gameplay with a point based system
  • Multiple endings
  • Explore a wide varieties of mature theme like sexual domination, submission and/or humiliation, cheating/swinging and/or interracial.

data.short_description: An unlikely encounter with a beautiful but mysterious lady knight from another world that will change your life forever...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or beter
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 730 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 顯示卡: GTX 750 or AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or beter
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GT 730 or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Graphics: GTX 750 or AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
